title: Excalibur | Additions: Minor Mods Support
description: A set of small mod supports, unified into one smooth Excalibur-themed collection
body: ![Mod's Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c752738c00931e373ca5aef588a12edeaee41b22.png) This **unofficial** compatibility pack ensures that the mods listed below seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack. ### **Current mods supported:** [_Advancement Plaques_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/advancement-plaques) - (100%) It is recommended to use the 8-digit hex color code #FF808080 for plaque titles (like "Advancement made!"). This option can be found within the mods config for visual options. _[Animal Feeding Trough](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/animal-feeding-trough)_ - (100%) _[Better Advancements](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-advancements)_ - (100%) [_Cherished Worlds_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cherished-worlds) - (100%) [_Chunk Loaders_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chunk-loaders) - (100%) [_Corpse_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/corpse) - (100%) [_Cosmetic Armor Reworked_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked) - (100%) [_Create Cobblestone_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-cobblestone) - (100%) [_Create Slice and Dice_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/slice-and-dice) - (100%) [_Create Synthethic Pressure_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-synthetic-pressure) - (100%) [_Decorative Storage_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/decostorage) - (100%) [_Easy Anvils_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/easy-anvils) - (100%) [_Easy Magic_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/easy-magic) - (100%) _[Easy Villagers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/easy-villagers)_ - (100%) [_Explorer's Compass_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/explorers-compass) - (100%) [_Fishermen's Trap_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fishermans-trap) - (100%) [_Fungi Stew_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fungi-stew) - (100%) [_Golden Hopper_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/golden-hopper) - (100%) _[Health Bars](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/health-bars)_ - (100%) [_Horseman_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/horseman) - (100%) [_Immersive Enchanting_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/immersive-enchanting) - (100%) [_Mystical Oak tree_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mystical-oak-tree) - (100%) [_Nature's Compass_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/natures-compass) - (100%) [_Overflowing Bars_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/overflowing-bars) - (100%) [_Pet Cemetery_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pet-cemetery) - (100%) [_Polymorph_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/polymorph) - (100%) [_Quality Equipment_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quality-equipment) - (100%) [_Realistic Horse Genetics_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/realistic-horse-genetics) - (5%, Only netherite horse armor) [_Simple Netherite Horse Armor_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-netherite-horse-armor) - (100%) [_Stylish Effects_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stylish-effects) - (100%) [_Trade Cycling_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/trade-cycling) - (100%) [_Warrior Rage_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/warrior-rage) - (100%) [_XP Tome_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xp-tome) - (100%) [_Yung's Cave Biomes_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yungs-cave-biomes) - (100%) **Credits:** * Maffhew – Creator of _Excalibur_ * Gray Scale – For his _Explorer's Compass_ textures * [Brass\_McCrafty](https://www.curseforge.com/members/brass_mccrafty/projects) – For his _XP Tome_ textures * TimothyWiggins – For his _Nature's Compass_ textures * [GrandPappyJay](https://www.curseforge.com/members/grandpappyjay/projects) – For his old textures of _Cherished Worlds_ from the [_Clarent_](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/clarent-excalibur-patch) resourcepack * [lowpolycat](https://www.curseforge.com/members/lowpolycat/projects) – For entrusting me with several mod supports she created * And also, a big thank you to every author of the mods included here. Feel free to include this in any modpack, just be sure to credit me properly! 🏰 If this pack pleases thine eye, grant it a heart or spread word of it afar! 🏰 [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-additions-mod-support)
